notes:
Game Boots just fine out of the box. If you get a black screen at any point. Toggle out of the application and then back in. I believe I got a black screen at some point during launch and a black screen when entering in-game for the first time. Toggling out of application and back in fixed the issue. I relaunched the game a couple of times after and the black screen issue wouldn't re-occur.
This game is labelled broke basically because all tests are Nvidia based. For AMD open source Mesa Driver based systems this game should run. Issues may come up during play time.
My guess is older AMD architectures will have different results.

title: Nioh: Complete Edition / 仁王 Complete Edition

notes:
All you have to do is create nioh.conf file in your home directory with this line: dxgi.deferSurfaceCreation = True 
After that add this line in game launch options in Steam: DXVK_CONFIG_FILE="/home/your_user_name/nioh.conf" %command% 
and launch the game!
Game works normally except for movies so keep that in mind.
title: Nioh: Complete Edition / 仁王 Complete Edition

notes: Needs DXVK option dxgi.deferSurfaceCreation = True . Use this to enable Media Foundation support for movie playback. https://files.catbox.moe/9zynz8.zip
title: Nioh: Complete Edition / 仁王 Complete Edition

notes: Besides disabling ESYNC, use PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1. Also have to create a nioh config file with this line: dxgi.deferSurfaceCreation = True and add DXVK_CONFIG_FILE="/path/to/config/file.conf" %command%. The proton force large address will avoid random crashes.

title: Nioh: Complete Edition / 仁王 Complete Edition

notes: Followed fixes below. Game runs fine. DXV 1.0.2 Has fixed included
title: Nioh: Complete Edition / 仁王 Complete Edition

notes:
Lots of tweaks are needed to get it to run. I've done as follows:

1). Disable Esync in launch options

2). Forced Large Address Aware in launch options (PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1)

3). Created a config file in my home directory (nioh.conf) with the line: dxgi.deferSurfaceCreation = True

4). Added the launch command: DXVK_CONFIG_FILE="/home/your_username/nioh.conf" %command%
(The complete string should be: 
PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 DXVK_CONFIG_FILE="/home/your_username/nioh.conf" %command%)

5). Changed fullscreen to borderless windowed in the launcher (Fullscreen breaks the game for me). 
 
Once all that is done, the game loads into the main menu (the cinematic fails to render. I'd imagine this is an issue with all pre-rendered cutscenes) but plays just fine in game.
title: Nioh: Complete Edition / 仁王 Complete Edition

notes: Applied the nioh.conf and no esync and other fixes listed below and ran fine but without cutscenes. Ran in fullscreen mode with no problem at 2160p.

It renders well (except for the lack of intro videos) but crashes often.
